CREATE TABLE test_strings (id Int32, text String);
INSERT INTO test_strings VALUES (1, 'не тормозит'), (2, 'hello world'), (3, 'тестирование функции initcapUTF8');
SELECT id, initcapUTF8(text) AS transformed_text FROM test_strings WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, initcapUTF8(text) AS transformed_text FROM test_strings WHERE text LIKE '%world%';
SELECT id, initcapUTF8(text) FROM test_strings ORDER BY id DESC;
SELECT initcapUTF8((SELECT text FROM test_strings WHERE id = 2));
SELECT initcapUTF8(CONCAT(text, ' - additional text')) FROM test_strings;
SELECT initcapUTF8(SUBSTRING(text, 1, 10)) FROM test_strings WHERE id = 3;
SELECT initcapUTF8(text) FROM (SELECT text FROM test_strings) AS subquery WHERE id = 1;
SELECT initcapUTF8('a b c d e f g h i j k l m n o p q r s t u v w x y z');
SELECT initcapUTF8('Турецкий язык: i versus İ');
